creator: fernan.aguero@gmail.com
text:
<precise description of the problem (multiple lines)>

        Catalyst is now at 5.8 in the FreeBSD ports tree,
        and old p5-Catalyst-Plugin-Authentication plugins break
        catalyst installations.

        From CPAN:
        The current version of the plugin is 0.10013, from June 2009.
        The version before 0.10013 was 0.10012
        And before that one, it was 0.10011
        then if we keep going back to the past we had
        0.10010
        0.100091 - this is dated Nov 2008!
        0.10009
        etc.

        In the last commit, FreeBSD downgraded the port from 0.10012
        to 0.100091, breaking all apps!

        Please revert this last commit!


-- 
fernan
